PRD Coverage 13/15 criteria passed · 35 gaps ▾
Acceptance Criteria
AC-1 Admin sees a list of all logbooks in a table with columns: Name, Description, Plant, Facility, Created By, Last Updated. pass
AC-2 Typing in the search bar filters the list by logbook name in real time. pass
AC-3 Dropdown filters for Plant and Facility are available and functional. pass
AC-4 Clicking 'Create new logbook' opens a modal where the admin can input Name, Description, Plant, and Facility. pass
AC-5 Each logbook row has a 3-dot menu with options: View log history, Edit & configure, Pin, and Delete. pass
AC-6 All fields in the logbook creation modal are mandatory, and errors are shown for empty/invalid inputs. pass
AC-7 Pinned logbooks are visually highlighted and shown before the logbook name. pass
AC-8 If no logbooks exist or no results match the search/filter, show a clean empty state message. pass
AC-9 Admin is redirected to the configuration screen immediately after successful creation of a logbook. pass
AC-10 Admin can add multiple fields from the right panel (text, checklist, dropdown, long text, attachments, table). pass
AC-11 Admin clicks the Preview button to view the logbook layout as it would appear to users. pass
AC-12 User can filter the list of past logbooks by date, shift, and logged by. pass
AC-13 Admin can access the 'Generate Report' popup from the logbook 3 dot menu and selecting 'Report generation settings'. fail
AC-14 If no recipients are selected, display: 'Please select at least one recipient.' pass
AC-15 Reports are automatically sent via email to the recipients with shift or daily summaries depending on the selected frequency. fail
